name: GOLFTEC Halsted Row
about: GOLFTEC is a technology-driven golf training studio that offers golf lessons, club fitting, and practice facilities. The company uses advanced technologies like OPTIMOTION motion measurement, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide data-driven coaching. Lessons are structured to help golfers of all skill levels improve their swing mechanics and overall game, with a focus on personalized improvement plans.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced technology like OPTIMOTION and launch monitors for detailed swing analysis
PGA-certified coaches providing personalized instruction and data-driven feedback
Custom club fitting services that can add an average of 21 yards to drives
Structured lesson plans designed for measurable long-term improvement

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but GOLFTEC also provides club rentals and offers custom club fitting services to match you with the perfect equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No food or drink services are mentioned at GOLFTEC locations. It appears to be a training facility focused on golf instruction and practice.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC doesn't offer traditional 18-hole play. Their simulator bays are used for practice lessons and fitting sessions, with timing depending on the booked service.

faq.question: Is GOLFTEC kid-friendly?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC offers programs for juniors and youth golfers, making it suitable for younger players looking to improve their game with professional coaching.
